穿越大宋，地狱开局。
我成了宋钦宗，北狩时的宋钦宗！
被金兵像牵羊一样的牵往上京！
华夏至极的屈辱，让我背上了！
生死存亡之际，觉醒【强军霸业】系统！
既然有金手指！那还怕个毛！
系统！我被抓了！抓往金国上京！
盛唐陌刀军，愿为陛下效死！
护朕杀出重围！
“皇儿啊！你可得来救我啊！朕错了！”赵佶泪流满面。
“你还有脸求救！你咋不嘎巴瘟死呢！”
“皇兄，快，您上座！老弟这就搬回王府！”赵构面对百万大军那还有争权都心思！
“哎呦现在知道投降了？早心思啥了！”
至此大宋多了一位暴君！
四方蛮夷？
藩属国？
老子来了，还叫什么藩属国！那是老子的一个省！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/103de5a5385a75987d116a34c036203d","author":"峰下遛狗","author_id":"","book_id":"7597291546978831422","book_name":"大宋开局北狩被俘！陌刀军护驾！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7597300887198908990","read_count":"20203","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"402634"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.0","serial_count":"157","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,宋朝,皇帝,系统,穿越,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/be2ddd3a75e90dba1d507a2328cb07d8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447030&x-signature=4iKTPtN8PkjVdpJnN0XVn%2FQRubE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"14291441710","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"15"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185030E22AADD96214D4E74322"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_
